protocols.Paper_title: Lipidomic study of intracellular Singapore grouper iridovirus
protocols.Evidence: Cells were harvested to purify intracellular SGIV by density gradient centrifugation; the figure notes an after-final-wash preparation.

protocols.Paper_title: Lipidomic study of intracellular Singapore grouper iridovirus
protocols.Evidence: Viruses were treated with solvent, detergents and lipases; detergent-treated proteins were examined after centrifugation.

protocols.Paper_title: Lipidomic study of intracellular Singapore grouper iridovirus
protocols.Evidence: Collected cells were washed and subjected to lipid extraction; purified virus was examined by EM and Western blotting.

protocols.Paper_title: Lipidomic study of intracellular Singapore grouper iridovirus
protocols.Evidence: Purified viruses were incubated with ether or DDM, then washed by centrifugation and examined under EM.

protocols.Paper_title: Lipidomic study of intracellular Singapore grouper iridovirus
protocols.Evidence: Solvent, detergent, and lipase-treated viruses were used for titer, lipid, and protein analyses.

protocols.Paper_title: Lipidomic study of intracellular Singapore grouper iridovirus
protocols.Evidence: Liposomes were prepared from extracted lipids; pretreated viruses were incubated with liposomes and titer was determined.

protocols.Paper_title: Lipidomic study of intracellular Singapore grouper iridovirus
protocols.Evidence: Lipid extracts were prepared from virus and cells; mixtures were centrifuged, and sphingolipid extraction used heating above 40C.

protocols.Paper_title: Lipidomic study of intracellular Singapore grouper iridovirus
protocols.Evidence: Apoptotic changes were monitored by microscopy; cells were labelled and stained using an apoptosis assay kit.
